resources.string: Already have an account? Sign in
Sign in to access your packs
Your achievements sync across all your devices
Add packs using a code or create your own in the Add tab
Create an achievement pack by filling out a form
Add an achievement pack directly using a code
Please log in to add achievement packs
Achievement pack with code \"%1$s\" is already in your collection
No achievement pack with code \"%1$s\" exists
No achievements yet. Add at least one achievement.
All achievements must have a title
This action cannot be undone. The pack and all its achievements will be permanently deleted.
Only the pack creator can edit or delete this pack
You must accept the Terms of Service to register

Terms of Service

Last updated: February 2026

Welcome to Achi. By creating an account and using this application, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

1. About the Service

Achi is an achievement tracking application that allows users to create, share, and track collections of achievements ("packs"). Users can create their own achievement packs and share them with others using unique codes.

2. User Accounts

You must create an account to use Achi. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information during registration. You may not create accounts for the purpose of violating these terms.

3. User-Generated Content

Users may create achievement packs that include text and images. By creating content, you grant Achi a non-exclusive, worldwide license to display and distribute your content within the service. You retain ownership of the content you create.

4. Prohibited Content and Behaviors

You may not create, upload, or share content that:

- Contains hate speech, discrimination, or promotes hatred against individuals or groups based on race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, disability, or nationality
- Harasses, bullies, threatens, or intimidates other users
- Is sexually explicit, pornographic, or contains nudity
- Depicts graphic violence, gore, or promotes dangerous activities
- Is illegal or promotes illegal activities
- Contains spam, misleading information, or deceptive content
- Infringes on intellectual property rights of others, including copyrights, trademarks, or patents
- Contains content harmful to minors or exploits children in any way
- Impersonates another person or entity
- Contains malware, viruses, or other harmful code
- Promotes self-harm or suicide

5. Enforcement

We reserve the right to remove any content and terminate any account that violates these terms, at our sole discretion and without prior notice. Accounts that repeatedly violate these terms will be permanently banned.

6. Disclaimer

The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access or that the service will be error-free.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Achi and its developers shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

8. Changes to Terms

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

9. Contact

If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at plezha.dev@gmail.com.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: February 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Achi collects, uses, and protects your information.

1. Information We Collect

Account information: username, display name, and password (stored as a secure hash).
User-generated content: achievement packs, achievement text, descriptions, and images you upload.
Usage data: achievement progress and completion status.

2. How We Use Your Information

To provide and maintain the service, including user authentication and content delivery.
To synchronize your achievement progress across devices.
To display your created content to other users who access it via pack codes.

3. Data Storage and Security

Your data is stored on secure servers. Passwords are hashed and never stored in plain text. We implement appropriate technical measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of electronic storage is 100%% secure.

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Your created achievement packs may be visible to other users who have the pack code. We may share information if required by law or to protect our legal rights.

5. Your Rights

You may request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting us. You may update your account information through the app.

6. Children's Privacy

Achi is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

7. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the app.

8. Contact

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at plezha.dev@gmail.com.
